site.description: Tabeeby is the digital gateway to Dr. Mina Merzek Clinic — a specialized orthopedic and bone clinic dedicated to restoring mobility, relieving pain, and delivering personalized surgical and non-surgical care.
site.mission: To provide world-class orthopedic care with compassion, precision, and a commitment to every patient's long-term recovery and quality of life.

hero.premiumTitle: Expert bone, joint & pediatric orthopedic surgery in Heliopolis.

executive.title: Dr. Mina Merzek
executive.subtitle: Founder · Lead Consultant · Lead Orthopedic Surgeon
executive.bio: The central figure of our clinic — combining advanced surgical skill with a warm, patient-first philosophy trusted by thousands of families across Egypt.

about.title: Mission & patient-centered care
careApproach: Patient-centered consultations with clear treatment plans
Advanced orthopedic and pediatric bone surgery expertise
Minimally invasive and arthroscopic techniques when appropriate

services.title: Orthopedic & bone clinic services
services.description: Comprehensive surgical and non-surgical care for bones, joints, and musculoskeletal conditions for adults and children.

pediatric.title: Pediatric Orthopedic Surgery
pediatric.description: Specialized diagnosis and treatment for bone and joint conditions in children, including congenital deformities and growth-related disorders.

joint.title: Joint Replacement
joint.description: Comprehensive hip, knee, and joint replacement procedures designed to restore function and reduce chronic pain.

sports.title: Arthroscopy & Sports Injuries
sports.description: Minimally invasive arthroscopic surgery for ligament tears, meniscus injuries, and athletic trauma recovery.

bone.title: Bone Deformities
bone.description: Corrective treatment for limb alignment issues, hip dysplasia, and structural bone abnormalities.

foot.title: Foot & Ankle Orthopedics
foot.description: Expert care for foot and ankle fractures, instability, and chronic conditions affecting mobility.

hand.title: Hand & Upper Limb Surgery
hand.description: Precision surgical care for hand, wrist, and upper limb injuries, fractures, and nerve-related conditions.

doctor.name: Dr. Mina Merzek
doctor.title: Consultant Orthopedic Surgeon
doctor.introduction: Dr. Mina Merzek is a highly experienced orthopedic surgeon specializing in bone surgery, joint care, and pediatric orthopedics. With advanced training from Egypt's National Institute for Motor and Nerve System, Dr. Merzek combines surgical excellence with a warm, patient-first approach at the Bone Clinic in Heliopolis, Cairo.
doctor.photoPlaceholder: Professional photo placeholder — replace with clinic asset
doctor.biography: As founder and lead consultant, Dr. Merzek has built Dr. Mina Merzek Clinic into a trusted destination for orthopedic excellence in Cairo — from pediatric hip conditions to complex joint replacement and sports injury recovery.

experience.title: Surgical excellence & clinic milestones
experience.description: A trusted record of orthopedic care, successful outcomes, and dedication to patient recovery.
experience.highlights: Every treatment plan is tailored to the individual — from first consultation through surgery, rehabilitation, and long-term follow-up. Our clinic prioritizes clear communication, minimally invasive options when possible, and outcomes that restore mobility and confidence.

milestones.title: Orthopedic Specialization
milestones.description: Completed advanced orthopedic and joint surgery training at Egypt's premier motor and nerve institute.

milestones.title: Pediatric Orthopedics Diploma
milestones.description: Earned professional diploma in pediatric orthopedic surgery, expanding care for young patients.

items.question: What conditions does Dr. Mina Merzek treat?
items.answer: Orthopedic and bone conditions including joint replacement, sports injuries, pediatric hip disorders, fractures, and foot and ankle surgery.

items.question: Where is the clinic located?
items.answer: 70 Abdel Aziz Fahmy Street, Saint Fatima Square, Heliopolis, Cairo, Egypt.

items.question: How can I book an appointment?
items.answer: Contact us via WhatsApp at +20 122 192 6646 or use the appointment form on this portal.
